package.name: ar_code_landing
package.description:
GPS-denied autonomous landing on the Otter USV using nested ArUco/AprilTag pose estimation, Garmin rangefinder altitude, and pure MAVROS attitude control.
Pipeline: aruco_pose_estimator (outer AprilTag 36h11, ID=10) → gimbal_aruco_tracker (keeps gimbal centred on deck) → ar_landing_controller (attitude + thrust, 50 Hz) → ar_landing_sm (state machine: PRE_ARMED→ARMING→CLIMBING→ALIGN→DESCEND→LANDED)
No GPS, no MRS goto, no global position reference.
